panels.description: Canonical Postgres order statuses for orders still owned by the funding/workflow-start path or Temporal workflows.
panels.title: In-Progress Order Queue

targets.expr: 100 * sum by (venue, method, endpoint) (rate(tee_router_venue_requests_total{status_class="2xx"}[5m])) / sum by (venue, method, endpoint) (rate(tee_router_venue_requests_total[5m]))
100 * sum by (chain, rpc_method) (rate(tee_router_chain_rpc_requests_total{status="success"}[5m])) / sum by (chain, rpc_method) (rate(tee_router_chain_rpc_requests_total[5m]))

sum by (taskqueue, task_type) (rate(poll_success_sync_count{taskqueue="tee_router_order_execution"}[1m])) / sum by (taskqueue, task_type) (rate(poll_success_count{taskqueue="tee_router_order_execution"}[1m]))
